Subject: Contract Documents - Project Alpha
body-plain:
Dear Procurement Team,

As requested, please find attached the following documents for Project Alpha:

1. Master Services Agreement (MSA) - MSA_ProjectAlpha_v2.1.pdf
2. Statement of Work (SOW) - SOW_ProjectAlpha_2024.pdf
3. Insurance Certificate - COI_LegalFirm_2024.pdf

Please review and sign where indicated. Return signed copies at your earliest convenience.

Key Terms:
- Contract Value: $125,000
- Duration: 12 months
- Start Date: February 1, 2024
- Payment Terms: Net 45

If you have any questions, please don't hesitate to reach out.

Best regards,
Sarah Johnson
Contracts Manager
Legal Firm LLP
contracts@legal-firm.com
(555) 987-6543
